steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: Distribute on both sides: $$10(x-4)=-2(x+20)$$ $$10x-40=-2x-40$$ Add $2x$ and $40$ to both sides: $$12x=0$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: Since the coefficient of $x$ is not $0$, the equation has exactly one solution, $x=0$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A (‘Exactly one’) says there is exactly one solution, so A is correct.
